predictions.reasoning: Article 30 mandates a processing activities register documenting all data processing with specific fields (controller details, purposes, data categories, recipients, third-country transfers, deletion periods, technical/organizational measures), which directly aligns with this application's purpose.

CRM systems process personal data (customer master data, contact history, consents) that must be documented in the processing register required by Article 30, making the CRM a subject of this regulation's inventory requirement.
